title: bitwise comparison fails after a cast
poc: select cast(16 as smallint) and cast(16 as smallint);
select bit_and(cast(16 as smallint), cast(16 as smallint)) = cast(16 as smallint);
key_bug_features: bitwise comparison fails after casting to smallint
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_bitwise (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, value INT, small_value SMALLINT, nullable_value INT NULL);
INSERT INTO test_bitwise (value, small_value) VALUES (16, cast(16 as smallint));
SELECT value AND small_value FROM test_bitwise WHERE small_value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT bit_and(cast(value as smallint), cast(small_value as smallint)) FROM test_bitwise;
SELECT 16 AND cast(nullable_value AS SMALLINT) FROM test_bitwise WHERE nullable_value IS NULL;
